name: Rick Kennedy
subject: This is appalling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress
body:
Pete Sessions is complicit with Washington GOP's cold, unfeeling agenda. In fact, he supported ending the Affordable Care Act -- an attack that is still going on to this day, even during a pandemic.

|
---

I hope you saw the email from my team last week, friends. I’m appalled by the Washington GOP’s reckless behavior over the last few years. And Pete Sessions is complicit with their cold, unfeeling agenda. In fact, he supported ending the Affordable Care Act -- an attack that is still going on to this day, _even during a pandemic._ As your next congressman, I will never vote in favor of reducing the availability of affordable health care. Pete Sessions can’t make that claim, and Texans deserve better. **But I need your help to beat Sessions. Together, we can keep him from continuing his attack on health care with his D.C. buddies and special interest backers.[_Can you chip in just $15 today?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20179788/255975574/-1714023214?refcode=fl_email_fr_20201011reckless2_RK_all_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTc3MGFkZi1kMTBiLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IqOpX30hUtWnpN1eQw160yJwkWX0lA7e0Zs3jte5_No=)** Thank you, Rick Kennedy \--------Forwarded message--------
From: Team Kennedy
Date: October 8, 2020
Subject: Reckless [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20179789/255975575/338717222?refcode=fl_email_fr_20201011reckless2_RK_all_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTc3MGFkZi1kMTBiLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IqOpX30hUtWnpN1eQw160yJwkWX0lA7e0Zs3jte5_No=)
The Washington GOP has gone from uncaring to reckless in the course of the past week. The president has spread COVID-19 to the people around him, put others at risk, and is continuing to minimize the severity of this crisis for seniors, parents, and all Texans, all for political stunts. And when Pete Sessions was among the highest ranking of that lot, he never stood up to them on behalf of his constituents -- he just went along with their dangerous agenda. We can’t allow him to go back to Washington and continue his destructive and corrupt ways when Washington is so broken because of reckless GOP leadership. We have to elect Rick Kennedy. **But right now our race is a coin flip -- it could go either way on Election Day.** **You have the power to put your thumb on the scale. clean_body: Pete Sessions is complicit with Washington GOP's cold, unfeeling agenda. In fact, he supported ending the Affordable Care Act -- an attack that is still going on to this day, even during a pandemic. | I hope you saw the email from my team last week, friends. I’m appalled by the Washington GOP’s reckless behavior over the last few years. And Pete Sessions is complicit with their cold, unfeeling agenda. In fact, he supported ending the Affordable Care Act -- an attack that is still going on to this day, even during a pandemic. As your next congressman, I will never vote in favor of reducing the availability of affordable health care. Pete Sessions can’t make that claim, and Texans deserve better. But I need your help to beat Sessions. Together, we can keep him from continuing his attack on health care with his D.C. buddies and special interest backers.= Thank you, Rick Kennedy \--------Forwarded message-------- From: Team Kennedy Date: October 8, 2020 Subject: Reckless = The Washington GOP has gone from uncaring to reckless in the course of the past week. The president has spread COVID-19 to the people around him, put others at risk, and is continuing to minimize the severity of this crisis for seniors, parents, and all Texans, all for political stunts. And when Pete Sessions was among the highest ranking of that lot, he never stood up to them on behalf of his constituents -- he just went along with their dangerous agenda. We can’t allow him to go back to Washington and continue his destructive and corrupt ways when Washington is so broken because of reckless GOP leadership. We have to elect Rick Kennedy. But right now our race is a coin flip -- it could go either way on Election Day. You have the power to put your thumb on the scale. Chip in now to help us ensure every voter knows about Pete Sessions’ self-serving agenda and Rick Kennedy’s Texas-first vision.= If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately: | | = | = | = | = Thank you, Team Kennedy | Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress Rick Kennedy for Congress 2203 Emmett Pkwy Austin, TX 78726 To unsubscribe, please .

subject: Hurry, Peter! Only a few weeks left!

body:

name: Lee Griffin For Congress
subject: Lee's Newsletter
body:
Hi everyone, I hope you’ve had a good week. I’m excited to get moving with the second day of our 15-county road trip tour of the
| | [**Can't See This Message?**_View in a browser_****](https://www.leegriffinforcongress.com/so/0fNKNTEki/c?w=StEl4Jn4bWdxGggv6Ele7NckZerNHoD5-hbCSP7v2OU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubGVlZ3JpZmZpbmZvcmNvbmdyZXNzLmNvbS9zby8wZk5LTlRFa2kiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJmZjkxYTIwZC1kYjE5LTQ0ZDUtYjNlZS05YjNmOGRiMGJjMmUifQ)
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| | Hi everyone, I hope you've had a good week. I'm excited to get moving with the second day of our 15-county road trip tour of the district. We had a great day one of the road trip with our first two stops in Lycoming and Sullivan Counties.
---
| | Our first stop was in Williamsport for the Lycoming County Democratic Committee's fall picnic where I spoke via Zoom about the importance of getting out the vote in the next 23 days. Thank you to Lycoming County Chair Morgan Allyn and Vice Chair Chuck Black for organizing the event and inviting me to speak.
---
|
---
| |
---
| Part two of the day was in Eagles Mere for a Meet and Greet with local residents at the home of Pat and Mick Piper-Smyer who graciously agreed to host us on their porch for a socially-distant gathering. I was excited to speak to Sullivan County residents again, this time in person, after having such a great telephone town hall earlier this year.
---
| | At our Meet and Greet yesterday we discussed a wide range of policy issues including de-politicizing the Supreme Court, protecting Social Security, and bridging the partisan divide. Thank you so much to County Chair Germaine Donahue and Sullivan County Democratic Committee for all their efforts, including sending postcards and taking out a full page ad in the Sullivan Review. This campaign would be nothing without the support of our County Chairs and County Committees spreading the word not just about our campaign, but all the state candidates and the Biden-Harris campaign. Today for Day Two of the tour we will be in Wyoming and Susquehanna Counties. From 10-1pm we'll be meeting at the HQ of the Wyoming County Democrats in Tunkhannock and from 3-5pm we'll be at the Hallstead HQ of the Susquehanna County Democrats. If you're in the area, please come out and say hello - and please remember to wear your mask. Here's our itinerary for the rest of the week. Please email info@leegriffinforcongress.com or contact your local County Chair for times and to RSVP. Day 3 - Monday, October 12th Bradford County Meet & Greet at The Mad Hatter, SayreTioga County Meet & Greet and Town Hall at the Deane Center, Wellsboro Day 4 - Tuesday, October 13thPotter County Meet & Greet at PCDC HQ, CoudersportClinton County Meet & Greet at CCDC HQ, Lock Haven Day 5 - Wednesday, October 14th Mifflin County Coffee Stop at East End Coffee, LewistownCentre County Meet & Greet and Town Hall at CCDC HQ, State College Day 6 - Thursday, October 15thJuniata County Breakfast Meet & Greet (TBA)Perry County Meet & Greet, New Bloomfield Day 7 - Friday, October 16th Northumberland County Meet & Greet, SunburyUnion County Meet & Greet, Lewisburg Day 8 - Saturday, October 17thSnyder County Meet & Greet at Selinsgrove Farmer's MarketFall For Lee Virtual Fundraiser We also had some very disturbing news this week that the FBI foiled a plot to kidnap Michigan Governor Gretchen Whitmer. This planned act of domestic terrorism demonstrates just how crucial the next three weeks are. What's at stake in this election is nothing short of the future of this country. This is why we need Joe Biden in the White House and leadership in Washington that calls for unity instead of stoking the fires of hatred and bigotry. We have the chance to change the course our country has been on for the past four years. It's going to take all of us working right up until election day. We can't slow down now. Please donate, volunteer to make calls, write post cards, and talk to your neighbors and make sure you all have a voting plan in place. And if you've already gotten your ballot, please make sure to enclose it in the secrecy envelope when you return it. We have 23 days left to make this happen. We can do this. The future is ours!Lee
---
| | | [**Donate**](https://www.leegriffinforcongress.com/so/0fNKNTEki/c?w=ehfkyCnWxosifeXLJrZ0qzY2mK0vvnPLUNTAhGe9zBo.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2xlZWdyaWZmaW5mb3Jjb25ncmVzcyIsInIiOiJiMDk0MDYwNS04NGEyLTQxNWQtZDE2OC05ZDdkOGExYTdkMmMiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJmZjkxYTIwZC1kYjE5LTQ0ZDUtYjNlZS05YjNmOGRiMGJjMmUifQ)

| [**PO Box 1294 Williamsport, PA 17703**](https://www.leegriffinforcongress.com/so/0fNKNTEki/c?w=2vZAqpifLSr8p4F08U1MWv4S5q9z30JLwRPZZh_GXYU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tYXBzLmdvb2dsZS5jb20vP3E9UE8rQm94KzEyOTQrV2lsbGlhbXNwb3J0JTJDK1BBKzE3NzAzIiwiciI6ImE4MDg2OGM0LTk3M2UtNGU3YS1hMDUxLTJhMTU5NTAwOTU2YiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImZmOTFhMjBkLWRiMTktNDRkNS1iM2VlLTliM2Y4ZGIwYmMyZSJ9)

**The _Lexington Herald-Leader_ has endorsed Josh!!**
This is a huge development in the race for Kentucky’s Sixth Congressional District, not only in the endorsement itself, but also in the strong case the _Herald-Leader_ Editorial Board made for Josh’s election.
The Board wrote:
_“Hicks best represents the 6th District’s widely varied voters, from the streets of Lexington to the rural areas that encircle it... Hicks points out correctly that there just aren’t that many farm boys like him in Washington, D.C., and we agree there should be. We wholeheartedly endorse Josh Hicks for the 6th District seat in the U.S. House of Representatives.”_
One of Josh’s core values is appreciation, and as a team, we deeply appreciate all that you have done to help us get to this point in the race. We are grateful to everyone who has helped us grow this campaign — whether you’ve contributed financially, given political advice, or simply shared Josh’s story with your friends, family, and community. This endorsement will give us critical momentum heading into the final stretch of the campaign, and we couldn’t have gotten here without you.
**We couldn’t have asked for a stronger endorsement, or clearer confirmation that Josh’s message and story are resonating.**
[_**Please make a contribution today**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20186660/256007946/21104712?refcode=fl_email_fr_20201011HLendorse2_JH_all_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTViM2I5NC1lYjBiLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zNrFJynwPan187TFeW-gJCJWObD4O-svT6286K83dv0=) to help us continue to grow our campaign, and build on this momentum. Then, help us share the news about this endorsement and the campaign — you can text, email, or post the news to social media using this custom ActBlue page: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hicksendorsement](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20186661/256007947/21104712?refcode=share&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTViM2I5NC1lYjBiLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zNrFJynwPan187TFeW-gJCJWObD4O-svT6286K83dv0=)
Thank you again for all your support — we appreciate you!

P.S. If you want to read the full endorsement from the Herald-Leader Editorial Board, we’re including it here:
**The 6th District deserves better: We endorse Josh Hicks for Congress**
By the Lexington Herald-Leader Editorial Board
_It would be hard to find a race with a more stark comparison between candidates than Kentucky’s 6th District race for the U.S House of Representatives: The Republican incumbent, U.S. Rep. Garland Hale “Andy” Barr IV, grew up in a patrician Lexington family that belonged to the[Idle Hour Country Club](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20186663/256007949/2082523793?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTViM2I5NC1lYjBiLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zNrFJynwPan187TFeW-gJCJWObD4O-svT6286K83dv0=&emci=74cd3305-390b-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=a15b3b94-eb0b-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&ceid=15601662) while Democratic challenger Josh Hicks worked his family’s tobacco patch on a Fleming County farm._
_They are both lawyers, it’s true, but Barr has spent most of his career in politics, first at the state level, then in Congress, while Hicks worked construction, joined the Marines, became a police officer and then worked his way through law school._
_Those experiences have shaped two very different sets of values, making it clear that Hicks best represents the 6th District’s widely varied voters, from the streets of Lexington to the rural areas that encircle it. Barr declined an interview with the editorial board, but the choice to endorse Hicks is an easy one based on his background, his temperament and his priorities for Kentucky’s working families on issues such as health care, education and taxes._
_We offer our sincere condolences to Barr, who recently lost his wife, Carol._
_And we congratulate him for his persistence in getting a successful House vote on a[much-needed bill on racetrack safety](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20186664/256007950/-1934513883?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTViM2I5NC1lYjBiLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zNrFJynwPan187TFeW-gJCJWObD4O-svT6286K83dv0=&emci=74cd3305-390b-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=a15b3b94-eb0b-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&ceid=15601662). Barr also does an efficient job with constituent services and veterans’ issues._
_But his[passionate enabling](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20186665/256007951/1822109267?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTViM2I5NC1lYjBiLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zNrFJynwPan187TFeW-gJCJWObD4O-svT6286K83dv0=&emci=74cd3305-390b-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=a15b3b94-eb0b-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&ceid=15601662) of President Donald Trump, his embrace of tax cuts and COVID-19 relief for the richest and most powerful, and his continued attacks on the Affordable Care Act — which cut Kentucky’s uninsured rates in half — make Barr more suited to helping a few families in rich ZIP codes than the middle- and working-class families spread out across the 6th District._
_By contrast, Hicks grew up on a farm, where he “scraped and shifted to get by.” Growing up and working in rural areas that have often been left behind, he’s seen why health care is so important, why we need more affordable avenues to higher education, and better infrastructure, including desperately needed broadband access across the deprived countryside. Like many rural Kentuckians, he grew up as a Republican but became a Democrat, as he explained last year: “Once somebody becomes the party exclusively of corporate special interests, that’s not what I believe government is intended to do.”_
_Hicks thinks government is still a force for good, but believes too many Kentucky voters are disenchanted and disengaged from the political system, which explains the low rate of voting in rural areas._
_“They don’t believe either party is helping them,” he told the editorial board. “It’s an entire repudiation of the entire political system.”_
_In 2018, Barr beat back a tough challenge from Amy McGrath by painting her as too liberal. He’ll be hard-pressed to use that argument this time around; Hicks supports a public option for health care, rather than Medicare for All, and says that while we must stop climate change, he would not support a Green New Deal._
_Unlike Barr, who often touts his support for coal, Hicks understands that coal is not actually a big presence in the 6th District, and noted that the “war on coal,” cited by Republicans during the Obama administration, was full of “empty rhetoric.” But he also supports coal as a continued presence to meet America’s future energy needs._
_Hicks also understands the extraordinary political moment we are in right now. Unlike Barr, who recently denied there is systemic racism in policing, Hicks is a former police officer who knows how complicated the problem can be, and supports a decrease in congressional funding of military hardware and training for police._
_Barr’s attack ads have been particularly crass this time around; he tried to paint Hicks as an enemy of health care providers who help COVID-19 patients, while failing to say that Hicks’ lawsuits against a hospital and a pharmaceutical company[were filed in 2019](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20186666/256007952/-856280124?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTViM2I5NC1lYjBiLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zNrFJynwPan187TFeW-gJCJWObD4O-svT6286K83dv0=&emci=74cd3305-390b-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=a15b3b94-eb0b-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&ceid=15601662), well before the pandemic began._
_Under Kentucky’s senior U.S. Senator, the Republican Party pays lip service to working-class families while honoring only the rich, a tradition that Barr has happily joined. Hicks points out correctly that there just aren’t that many farm boys like him in Washington, D.C., and we agree there should be. We wholeheartedly endorse Josh Hicks for the 6th District seat in the U.S. House of Representatives._

| Josh Hicks is a Democrat running to represent the hardworking, everyday folks of Kentucky’s 6th Congressional District. He will be a representative who puts the needs of his constituents front and center in Washington, not corporations or dark-money donors.
---
That means his campaign is relying on grassroots donations — lots of small donations from emails like this — not big checks from corporate special interests. Please consider making a contribution today.
| [**Contribute ➞**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20186667/256007953/21104712?refcode=fl_email_fr_20201011HLendorse2_JH_all_xx_ftr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTViM2I5NC1lYjBiLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zNrFJynwPan187TFeW-gJCJWObD4O-svT6286K83dv0=)
---

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20186669/256007955/-1082575601?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTViM2I5NC1lYjBiLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zNrFJynwPan187TFeW-gJCJWObD4O-svT6286K83dv0=&emci=74cd3305-390b-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=a15b3b94-eb0b-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&ceid=15601662) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20186671/256007957/209776233?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTViM2I5NC1lYjBiLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zNrFJynwPan187TFeW-gJCJWObD4O-svT6286K83dv0=&emci=74cd3305-390b-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=a15b3b94-eb0b-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&ceid=15601662)

clean_body: I am so honored to have received the endorsement of the Herald-Leader, and I am so appreciative of all that you have done to help get us to this point. | | Hey folks, did you hear the news? I am so honored to have received the endorsement of the Herald-Leader , and I am so appreciative of all that you have done to help get us to this point. This is big news, and it reflects the momentum behind our campaign — but we can’t let up now. The job’s not done until November 3rd, and we need your help to close this race out strong. = \- Josh ** | | = \--------Forwarded message-------- From: Team Hicks Date: October 10, 2020 Subject: BREAKING: The Lexington Herald-Leader endorses Josh Hicks = Friends, We have some very exciting news to share... = The Lexington Herald-Leader has endorsed Josh!! This is a huge development in the race for Kentucky’s Sixth Congressional District, not only in the endorsement itself, but also in the strong case the Herald-Leader Editorial Board made for Josh’s election. The Board wrote: “Hicks best represents the 6th District’s widely varied voters, from the streets of Lexington to the rural areas that encircle it... Hicks points out correctly that there just aren’t that many farm boys like him in Washington, D.C., and we agree there should be. We wholeheartedly endorse Josh Hicks for the 6th District seat in the U.S. House of Representatives.” One of Josh’s core values is appreciation, and as a team, we deeply appreciate all that you have done to help us get to this point in the race. We are grateful to everyone who has helped us grow this campaign — whether you’ve contributed financially, given political advice, or simply shared Josh’s story with your friends, family, and community. This endorsement will give us critical momentum heading into the final stretch of the campaign, and we couldn’t have gotten here without you. We couldn’t have asked for a stronger endorsement, or clearer confirmation that Josh’s message and story are resonating. = to help us continue to grow our campaign, and build on this momentum. Then, help us share the news about this endorsement and the campaign — you can text, email, or post the news to social media using this custom ActBlue page: = Thank you again for all your support — we appreciate you! Team Hicks = P.S. If you want to read the full endorsement from the Herald-Leader Editorial Board, we’re including it here: The 6th District deserves better: We endorse Josh Hicks for Congress By the Lexington Herald-Leader Editorial Board It would be hard to find a race with a more stark comparison between candidates than Kentucky’s 6th District race for the U.S House of Representatives: The Republican incumbent, U.S. Rep. Garland Hale “Andy” Barr IV, grew up in a patrician Lexington family that belonged to the while Democratic challenger Josh Hicks worked his family’s tobacco patch on a Fleming County farm. They are both lawyers, it’s true, but Barr has spent most of his career in politics, first at the state level, then in Congress, while Hicks worked construction, joined the Marines, became a police officer and then worked his way through law school. Those experiences have shaped two very different sets of values, making it clear that Hicks best represents the 6th District’s widely varied voters, from the streets of Lexington to the rural areas that encircle it. Barr declined an interview with the editorial board, but the choice to endorse Hicks is an easy one based on his background, his temperament and his priorities for Kentucky’s working families on issues such as health care, education and taxes. We offer our sincere condolences to Barr, who recently lost his wife, Carol. And we congratulate him for his persistence in getting a successful House vote on a. Barr also does an efficient job with constituent services and veterans’ issues. But his of President Donald Trump, his embrace of tax cuts and COVID-19 relief for the richest and most powerful, and his continued attacks on the Affordable Care Act — which cut Kentucky’s uninsured rates in half — make Barr more suited to helping a few families in rich ZIP codes than the middle- and working-class families spread out across the 6th District. By contrast, Hicks grew up on a farm, where he “scraped and shifted to get by.” Growing up and working in rural areas that have often been left behind, he’s seen why health care is so important, why we need more affordable avenues to higher education, and better infrastructure, including desperately needed broadband access across the deprived countryside. Like many rural Kentuckians, he grew up as a Republican but became a Democrat, as he explained last year: “Once somebody becomes the party exclusively of corporate special interests, that’s not what I believe government is intended to do.” Hicks thinks government is still a force for good, but believes too many Kentucky voters are disenchanted and disengaged from the political system, which explains the low rate of voting in rural areas. “They don’t believe either party is helping them,” he told the editorial board. “It’s an entire repudiation of the entire political system.” In 2018, Barr beat back a tough challenge from Amy McGrath by painting her as too liberal. He’ll be hard-pressed to use that argument this time around; Hicks supports a public option for health care, rather than Medicare for All, and says that while we must stop climate change, he would not support a Green New Deal. Unlike Barr, who often touts his support for coal, Hicks understands that coal is not actually a big presence in the 6th District, and noted that the “war on coal,” cited by Republicans during the Obama administration, was full of “empty rhetoric.” But he also supports coal as a continued presence to meet America’s future energy needs. Hicks also understands the extraordinary political moment we are in right now. Unlike Barr, who recently denied there is systemic racism in policing, Hicks is a former police officer who knows how complicated the problem can be, and supports a decrease in congressional funding of military hardware and training for police. Barr’s attack ads have been particularly crass this time around; he tried to paint Hicks as an enemy of health care providers who help COVID-19 patients, while failing to say that Hicks’ lawsuits against a hospital and a pharmaceutical company, well before the pandemic began. Under Kentucky’s senior U.S. Senator, the Republican Party pays lip service to working-class families while honoring only the rich, a tradition that Barr has happily joined. Hicks points out correctly that there just aren’t that many farm boys like him in Washington, D.C., and we agree there should be. We wholeheartedly endorse Josh Hicks for the 6th District seat in the U.S. House of Representatives. | Josh Hicks is a Democrat running to represent the hardworking, everyday folks of Kentucky’s 6th Congressional District. He will be a representative who puts the needs of his constituents front and center in Washington, not corporations or dark-money donors. That means his campaign is relying on grassroots donations — lots of small donations from emails like this — not big checks from corporate special interests. Please consider making a contribution today. | = | Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress Josh Hicks for Congress PO Box 1214 Lexington, KY 40588 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

subject: Donald Trump is tweeting about our race!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani?=
subject: I'm Coming Out! 🎉
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b24af13d6c9f/im-coming-out?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| | Today is National Coming Out Day!

I came out when I was 15, and then hundreds of times since.

In the 20 years since I told my mom I was bisexual (I prefer “queer” now), we’ve seen rights for the LGBTQ+ community move ahead by leaps and bounds. And now we are seeing them threatened by members of the Supreme Court and by Representatives like my opponent, Adam Kinzinger.

Adam Kinzinger has made a career out of being hostile toward the queer community. He voted against the Equality Act and has been maliciously antagonistic toward trans folx for the decade he has served in Congress.

[_We’ve got a shot at unseating this guy, and we can do it with your help. Let’s send him packing._](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=587c9f8571&e=140a9b81e7)

And hug your LGBTQ+ friends today (with consent...and a mask) — those who’ve come out and those who haven’t. Everyone deserves love and support.

Peace,
Dani
---
| | | | | | | [](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=d00605ccfc&e=140a9b81e7)

subject: Three days left - this is huge, Patriot
body:
We have just THREE DAYS LEFT until this campaign’s final reporting deadline.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-396961-934795-5237556-fcdbcf6880-c6fe844e5d)
Patriot,

I’ve set a goal of raising $230,000 to help get this campaign across the finish line. [**Can I count you in with a gift of just $10 now?**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-396961-934795-5237556-fcdbcf6880-c6fe844e5d)

[**Please help propel this campaign to victory by pitching in just $10—or even $25 or $50—right away.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-396961-934795-5237557-9505efa3da-c6fe844e5d)

When I launched this campaign, all the pundits wrote off my race.

The mainstream media laughed at me. Establishment politicians counted me out. The radical left called me every awful name in the book.

**You had my back every step of the way.** You helped this campaign prove everyone wrong.

We’re ready to win on November 3. But only if I can count on your help, your enthusiasm, and your generosity once again.

I know $230,000 is a big goal... and I know three days isn’t very much time.

**But I also know that you won’t let me down, Patriot, after you’ve helped me come this far.[Can I count you in for $10?](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-396961-934795-5237556-fcdbcf6880-c6fe844e5d)**

[**Help me take this campaign over the finish line by pitching in $10, $25, or even $50 right away.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-396961-934795-5237557-9505efa3da-c6fe844e5d)

Thanks for your help!

Laura Loomer

subject: Jackie jeopardizes the health of her constituents
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
As a sitting congresswomen, Jackie’s dereliction of duty is inexcusable. | | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=1a96d217b9&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | |
---
---
|
---
---
| Dear Friend,

The Elkhart County Health Department issued an alarming statement regarding the spike in COVID-19 cases this week, warning that the “community spread [is] coming back to exact a terrible toll on the people of this county—both in terms of illness and in death.”1

How does Jackie respond? She attends a Trump rally at the Elkhart County Courthouse without a mask, without any social distancing, and shaking hands. How do we know this? Because she proudly posted the above pictures on her Facebook page.

More than 350 COVID-19 deaths have been reported over the past month2, leaving Hoosier families grieving. Indiana set a new one-day case record on Saturday with 1,945 positive tests3. Elkhart General Hospital is at capacity and has no more rooms for COVID-19 patients.4

**Yet here stands science denier, Jackie Walorski, without a mask, standing shoulder-to-shoulder, hugging attendees, posing arm-in-arm for pictures with people at a rally for her own political gain. **

As a sitting congresswomen, Jackie’s dereliction of duty is inexcusable.

As Jackie recklessly ignores the advice of medical professionals and jeopardizes the health of her constituents, she continues to fight to take away healthcare for those with pre-existing conditions. [**Jackie is unfit for office.**](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=867063716b&e=5886ca081d)

Pat stands ready to serve. Invest in a candidate who believes in science, evidence, and reason. Invest in Pat, and defeat the reckless abandonment of care for the people in this district.
---

**In just a few days, we are facing our _final_ FEC fundraising deadline before Election Day. **

Like we’ve shared before, our FEC fundraising deadlines are some of the most important measurements of success in our campaign. With the entire country watching to see how the fight to represent PA-10 plays out, **it’s critical that our public fundraising report showcases just how strong this grassroots team is in the final days of our race.**

Did you see the news? It’s big!
Friend,

Did you see the news? It’s big! According to the latest poll, we are neck and neck with our opponent -- proof that what we are doing is working. The people of this district are ready for new leadership and it’s our message that’s resonating.

We are gaining momentum by the day, and we need your help to keep it going -- that’s why I’m emailing you right now, to ask if you can make your first contribution to help power our campaign as we quickly approach Election Day.

Click on this secure link to make a donation right now: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/margaretgoodfl16](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20195039/256041032/1073285021?refcode2=f86b6ac0-1b0c-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&emci=ee52b94d-070c-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=f86b6ac0-1b0c-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&refcode=101120-es-polling-alert-kicker&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODZiNmFjMC0xYjBjLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TC767zNkstyRcFceN7ERIQKV_pGsBuZaD7T0BXnQtYk=)**

Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. subject: Don't let up, Peter

body:
We've got Sen. Cornyn panicked.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891c93/7f51f7bc/473fedec/4efb8c10/819491499/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter,

We told you **we outraised Sen. Cornyn this last quarter.**

We told you **we outspent him 2:1**

Now, **we 've erased his cash advantage.** Check it out: | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891c93/7f51f7bc/473fedec/4efb8c17/819491499/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyOTYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20201011.2nd__2296__&amount=10")
---
Sen. Cornyn is _**panicking**_ and calling in every political favor he can from his friends in Washington, and they're pouring millions into his campaign to bail him out.

Peter, now isn't the time to lay off the gas -- it's time to dig deep. **[Can we count on you to keep our momentum going and ensure that we keep outraising and outspending Sen. Cornyn all the way through Election Day?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891c93/7f51f7bc/473fedec/4efb8c17/819491499/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyOTYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20201011.2nd__2296__&amount=10")**

Every grassroots dollar we raise is another dollar going towards outreach to crucial undecided voters who will decide this election, and we NEED your help to reach them all.

**Don 't let up, Peter.**

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Important Vote on MONDAY
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vote_on_monday&n=1)
---
Peter \-- **IMPORTANT: VOTE TO END WALZ' EMERGENCY POWERS ON MONDAY! LEGISLATIVE SESSION BEGINS AT NOON.** Governor Walz just extended his "emergency" powers for another 30 days. We are now on **212 days** of a declared "emergency" in Minnesota. This vote will be the last vote to End Walz' Emergency Powers before the important November election. Therefore, we NEED YOUR HELP! Please contact these Democrat legislators so they know that Minnesotans no longer want one guy calling all the shots. **Rep Brad Tabke - 651-296-8872 / [rep.brad.tabke@house.mn](mailto:rep.brad.tabke@house.mn)** **Rep Rob Ecklund - 651-296-2190 /[rep.rob.ecklund@house.mn](mailto:rep.rob.ecklund@house.mn)** **Rep Dan Wolgamott - 651-296-6612 /[rep.dan.wolgamott@house.mn](mailto:rep.dan.wolgamott@house.mn)** **Rep Jeff Brand - 651-296-8634 /[rep.jeff.brand@house.mn](mailto:rep.jeff.brand@house.mn)** **Script:** Rep ______, Governor Walz just extended his self-declared emergency powers again. That's 212 days of an "emergency". He's grossly abused these powers to shut down our economy, limit our civil liberties, and most importantly, take over law-making powers in our state. It's time you vote to take back the Legislature's power by voting YES on ending Walz' Emergency Powers on Monday. **Alternate Script:** Rep ______, every time a vote has come up to end Walz' Emergency Powers over the last 212 days, you've voted against the people of Minnesota. We've had enough with one guy calling all the shots. This is not the system of government we want. Vote YES on Monday to End Walz' Emergency Powers or it's time I send my support to your opponent. Let's light up their phones with our messages. If you have a personal story about how Walz' orders affected you, please let them know. Now is the time for us to win, otherwise we will be forced to solve this issue on November 3rd. [**Make sure to follow us on Facebook Monday afternoon for updates on the vote!**](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=xVQJp8sIg0YIME9Lo-Z4s5erbPF9ddrQ2TYfxqr6WhE6UwE3fGtGTlc1vzQFknU-&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vote_on_monday&n=2) **In Liberty,

** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vote_on_monday&n=3).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vote_on_monday&n=4).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vote_on_monday&n=5), software for leaders.

name: Jaime Harrison
subject: we have a real shot to win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
#
Team, Senator Rosen said I could reach out. **I 'm humbly asking for your help to beat Lindsey Graham and flip South Carolina BLUE. [Can I count on you to split a $5 contribution between my campaign and Jacky Rosen today?](https://secure.rosenfornevada.%3D/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jr-201010-jaime-harrison?refcode=em201010i_4659&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=89053&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Henderson&state=NV&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
I'm proud of all that this grassroots team has done. We even **OUTRAISED** Lindsey the first two quarters of the year!
**And according to the nonpartisan election experts at Cook Political Report, this race is a _TOSSUP._**
_We have a real shot to win._
But Lindsey and his wealthy donors are going to do -- and spend -- whatever it takes to destroy our grassroots movement.
We have a plan to reach swing voters across the state and retake the lead, but we need to raise $42,415 before midnight tomorrow.
We can't do this without you. **[Will you chip in a few dollars to my campaign and Jacky Rosen to help me defeat Lindsey and flip South Carolina blue?](https://secure.rosenfornevada.%3D/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jr-201010-jaime-harrison?refcode=em201010i_4659&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=89053&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Henderson&state=NV&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Together, we can bring hope back to the people Lindsey has left behind.
Jaime Harrison
U.S. Senate Candidate
South Carolina

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Team Fair Fight Action
subject: Georgia - tomorrow is the first day to vote early in person!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4b6/34a064cc/1a0bb9d7/702c823/1370435765/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | Friend - **Tomorrow, October 12, is the first day of in-person early voting in Georgia!** The best way to make your voice heard this November is by making a plan to vote and having your vote counted as soon as possible! Here's how you make a plan to vote:
* When and where are you going to vote? Check your county's early voting locations, dates, and times at [IWillVote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4b6/34a064cc/1a0bb9d7/702c820/1370435765/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://iwillvote.com/") or by calling either 866-OUR-VOTE (866-687-8683) or your county Board of Elections. You can find the contact information for county boards [here](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4b6/34a064cc/1a0bb9d7/702c821/1370435765/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://elections.sos.ga.gov/Elections/countyelectionoffices.do").
* Know when you're voting? Great! Make sure you bring the correct ID when voting in person. Check [this list of acceptable IDs](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4b6/34a064cc/1a0bb9d7/702c82e/1370435765/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://sos.ga.gov/index.php/elections/georgia_voter_identification_requirements2").
* Put your plan on your calendar and stick to it!

Once you've made your plan to vote early, check with your family and friends to make sure they know early voting starts tomorrow in Georgia. Don't delay! November 3 is the last day to vote-- but you have the power to make your voice heard now. For more information, visit [peachvote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4b6/34a064cc/1a0bb9d7/702c82f/1370435765/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://www.peachvote.com"). Thank you for voting, Team Fair Fight Action |

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Texas is the biggest battleground state in the country
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE, POWEREDXPEOPLE
body:
Texas is the biggest battleground state in the country, with elections for
the State House that will determine the future of redistricting and a
Presidential contest that might come down to the Lone Star State’s 38
electoral college votes.

It’s only fitting then that we’d meet this opportunity with the largest
single-day phone bank in Texas history, [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43676?source=ema20201011-108255&t=1001&akid=108255%2E444211%2E3dPv6z ]and I’d love for you to join
us.

Tomorrow we will call more than one million Texas voters, reaching out to
them the day before Early Voting begins to make sure they have a plan to
vote.

These calls can make the difference between someone voting or not voting,
between winning or losing these important elections.

And we will be in good company. Willie Nelson. Bernie Sanders. Julián
Castro. Stacey Abrams. Andrew Yang. And about thousands of volunteers from
all over the country.

We’re counting on you to come through for us. And I promise if you do,
we’ll do everything in our power to make sure Texas comes through for you
and the rest of America on November 3rd.

RSVP here:
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43676?source=ema20201011-108255&t=1002&akid=108255%2E444211%2E3dPv6z ]Calling Texas: The Million Voter Phone Bank
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43676?source=ema20201011-108255&t=1003&akid=108255%2E444211%2E3dPv6z ]Monday, October 12

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43676?source=ema20201011-108255&t=1004&akid=108255%2E444211%2E3dPv6z ]Get more info or RSVP »

Let's do this!

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1005&akid=108255%2E444211%2E3dPv6z

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE, POWEREDXPEOPLE.ORG, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.
